content: Install script OS/arch detection pattern: OS via 'uname -s' (Linux/Darwin), arch via 'uname -m' (x86_64/arm64/aarch64). Map arm64->aarch64 for consistency with Rust target triples. Download URL template: GITHUB_RELEASES/{tag}/{binary}-{target}.tar.gz. Verify with sha256sum (Linux) or shasum -a 256 (macOS). Extract with tar xzf. Fallback chain: (1) detect prebuilt binary for OS+arch, (2) fall back to cargo install if rustup detected, (3) fall back to bash script. Security: enforce https, check exit codes.
